rows.description: Recepta Varia

rows.description: The The BL 603 540. ---9

rows.description: Settled for Norton Rent due Michs 1812
rows.notes: Selected 'gemini-flash' for the description, as 'Norton' is a more accurate reading than 'Newton'. Both correctly identified no monetary amount for this narrative row.
rows.english_description: Settlement of the Norton rent which was due at Michaelmas 1812.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Settlement of the Norton rent due at Michaelmas 1812 (amount not recorded here).

rows.description: ...Money Rent as usual 265--
rows.notes: Selected 'gpt-5-mini' for correctly identifying that this line has no associated monetary amount in the columns. 'gemini-flash' incorrectly assigned the amount from the subsequent line. Used 'gemini-flash' description for clarity ('265--' is visible).
rows.english_description: Continuation note for usual money rent (referencing an amount of 265).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Money rent as usual, referenced at 265 (amount not fully recorded here).

rows.description: Money Rent (cont.)
rows.notes: Added this row. 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified this as a separate line with a monetary amount (15.9.8) that 'gemini-flash' incorrectly merged with the previous descriptive line. Pounds column is blank. Description enhanced for clarity.
rows.english_description: Continuation of money rent received.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Continuation of money rent received, amounting to £15 9s 8d.

rows.description: 280.9.0 (crossed out subtotal)
rows.notes: Visually identified '280.9.0' as a crossed-out subtotal written in the description column, not an amount to be extracted from amount columns. Both extractors misrepresented this line. 'gpt-5-mini' incorrectly put it in the amount columns; 'gemini-flash' merged it with the next line.
rows.english_description: Crossed-out subtotal of receipts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Crossed-out subtotal of receipts recorded as £280 9s 0d.

rows.description: Ded. L^d Tax
rows.notes: Selected 'gpt-5-mini' for its accurate identification of 'Ded Ld Tax' and the correct amount 24.7.0. 'gemini-flash' merged description from a previous line. The dash indicates zero pence.
rows.english_description: Deduction for the land tax.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Deduction for land tax, amounting to £24 7s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected 'gemini-flash' as it correctly identified '240.2.8' as a subtotal written in the description column with no corresponding amount in the value columns. 'gpt-5-mini' misread the pounds value (246) and incorrectly placed it in the amount columns.

rows.description: Total
